case_title: MANGUBI, IRINA vs. FALKOV, YURI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANGUBI, IRINA AS TO DEFENDANT FALKOV, YURI DOES 1 TO 60, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-30-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-30-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-30-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR LIPOVETSKY, VITALY AS ATTORNEY FOR MANGUBI, IRINA

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-03-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL. (ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 12/3/96 - DEFT'S ADDRESS WAS IN SYSTEM AS OF 11/8/96) HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
